description:
Create a reusable library of standard email templates in BlueMail within a folder named 'Response-Templates'. The library must contain three master drafts:
- Subject: 'Template: Acknowledgment' | Body: 'Thank you for your message. We have received it and are reviewing.'
- Subject: 'Template: Schedule Call' | Body: 'This sounds like a complex topic. Can we schedule a brief call to discuss?'
- Subject: 'Template: Fix Deployed' | Body: 'The fix for this issue has been deployed to the staging environment. Please verify.'
Using the content from 'Template: Acknowledgment', reply to an email in the Inbox (e.g., from SAdev). Ensure the master template is preserved in the 'Response-Templates' folder after sending the reply.
